calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS PRECILA BALABBO, AND EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No apppearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable.

Order submitted. Consent judgment submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
